description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3 Docker image and defines a single stage called deploy. Add a deploy job that runs only for tag pipelines, executes `pip install -U twine setuptools wheel`, then `python setup.py bdist_wheel`, and finally `twine upload -u "$PYPI_USER" -p "$PYPI_PASS" dist/*` to publish the built wheel to PyPI using the PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASS secret variables. The job is assigned to the deploy stage and has no caches or artifacts.
